issues.description: Action type is 'TrashFromHand' but card text says 'place 2 cards with type CP from your trash' — this is a SearchDeck/retrieval action, not a trash action. Direction is reversed.
Filter references 'subType' but 'CP' is a type descriptor, not a subtype. Should filter by type containing 'CP'.
Missing 'amount' parameter: card specifies '2 cards' must be placed. Action should specify count=2.
Action does not specify destination. Text says 'at the bottom of your deck' — should include destination parameter.
Missing optional flag: text says 'You may' — action should include optional:true.
Target allows choosing opponent character, but text specifies 'up to 1' — should enforce max:1 on selection.
